_notes: FFL1 World Structure. Reconstructed from game knowledge. World map uses tile-based grid navigation.

worlds.name: World 1
worlds.description: The first world. Home to the starting town Base and several dungeons. Contains the Castle of Sword, dungeon caves, and a prison fortress.
worlds.goal: Collect 4 Crystal Balls to open the gate to World 2.

locations.name: Base
locations.description: Starting town. Has item shops, weapon shops, and the Crystal Ball gate.

locations.name: Castle of Sword
locations.description: A fortress ruled by guards. Contains the first Crystal Ball. Features prison cells with captive princesses.

locations.name: Cave of Thunder
locations.description: A natural cave filled with insects and plants.

locations.name: Bandit's Cave
locations.description: Hideout of bandits. Contains valuable equipment.

locations.name: Dungeon of Death
locations.description: A dark fortress dungeon with skeletal guards.

locations.name: World Gate
locations.description: Gate to World 2. Opens when you have all 4 Crystal Balls.

worlds.name: World 2
worlds.description: The second world. Features floating islands, water temples, and exotic creatures. Has a witch who steals youth.
worlds.goal: Collect 4 Crystal Balls and defeat the world guardian.

locations.name: Town of Sky
locations.description: Town floating in the clouds. Has advanced equipment for sale.

worlds.name: World 3
worlds.description: A technologically advanced world under siege by machines. Contains robots and advanced weapons.
worlds.goal: Collect 4 Crystal Balls and confront the machine god.

locations.name: Cyber City
locations.description: A city under robot occupation. Resistance members hide inside.

worlds.name: World 4
worlds.description: The fourth and most dangerous world. Dark atmosphere, powerful demons, and the entrance to the Tower of God.
worlds.goal: Find the entrance to the Tower of God.

locations.name: Dark Town
locations.description: A grim town near the Tower of God. Sells the best equipment.

locations.name: Tower of God Entrance
locations.description: The base of the Tower of God.

worlds.name: Tower of God
worlds.description: The final dungeon. A 20-floor tower leading to the Creator. Guarded by the Four Divine Beasts (second forms) and culminating in battles with Ashura and the Creator.
worlds.goal: Reach the top and defeat the Creator.

locations.name: Tower B1-10
locations.description: Lower floors with increasingly powerful monsters.

locations.name: Tower B11-20
locations.description: Upper floors leading to the Creator's chamber.
